title: Dungeons Lanterns
description: Makes normal, and soul lanterns look like the ones from Minecraft Dungeons.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Dungeons Lanterns** brings the adds the style of lantern found in Minecraft Dungeons.


![Changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fa66b49032f32e9bda3abbc30537784ac421bf8_0.webp)


<details>
<summary>List</summary>

- Lantern
- Soul Lantern
- Iron Chain
- Redstone Lamp


</details>
